violations.text: Store pick-up grocery items were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025

The doors to the outside, located at the front entrance, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025

Various food items were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler(s), walk-in freezer(s), and back storage area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. PIC talked with staff and staff picked items up. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, ice, old droppings, and/or other debris: - retail cooler and freezer shelves, - retail shelves, - back storage shelves. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025

The floors throughout the facility (especially in the walk-in coolers and back storage area) have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025

The following was observed in poor repair: - retail freezer door gasket (heavy ice accumulation observed) - online order walk-in cooler (duck tape observed on one of the doors) The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2025
Bags of chocolate and chips were observed in direct contact with rodent droppings. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by adulterated food and rodent droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024

The door to the outside (ambient room fire tunnel door), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2024

The floors in the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
